verses.arabicText: وَنَبِّئْهُمْ أَنَّ ٱلْمَآءَ قِسْمَةٌۢ بَيْنَهُمْ ۖ كُلُّ شِرْبٍۢ مُّحْتَضَرٌۭ
verses.translationText: And inform them that the water is shared between them, each [day of] drink attended [by turn].

verses.arabicText: فَنَادَوْا۟ صَاحِبَهُمْ فَتَعَاطَىٰ فَعَقَرَ
verses.translationText: But they called their companion, and he dared and hamstrung [her].

verses.arabicText: فَكَيْفَ كَانَ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
verses.translationText: And how [severe] were My punishment and warning.

verses.arabicText: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ صَيْحَةًۭ وَٰحِدَةًۭ فَكَانُوا۟ كَهَشِيمِ ٱلْمُحْتَظِرِ
verses.translationText: Indeed, We sent upon them one blast from the sky, and they became like the dry twig fragments of an [animal] pen.

verses.arabicText: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍۢ
verses.translationText: And We have certainly made the Qur'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?

verses.arabicText: كَذَّبَتْ قَوْمُ لُوطٍۭ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
verses.translationText: The people of Lot denied the warning.

verses.arabicText: إِنَّآ أَرْسَلْنَا عَلَيْهِمْ حَاصِبًا إِلَّآ ءَالَ لُوطٍۢ ۖ نَّجَّيْنَٰهُم بِسَحَرٍۢ
verses.translationText: Indeed, We sent upon them a storm of stones, except the family of Lot - We saved them before dawn

verses.arabicText: نِّعْمَةًۭ مِّنْ عِندِنَا ۚ كَذَٰلِكَ نَجْزِى مَن شَكَرَ
verses.translationText: As favor from us. Thus do We reward he who is grateful.

verses.arabicText: وَلَقَدْ أَنذَرَهُم بَطْشَتَنَا فَتَمَارَوْا۟ بِٱلنُّذُرِ
verses.translationText: And he had already warned them of Our assault, but they disputed the warning.

verses.arabicText: وَلَقَدْ رَٰوَدُوهُ عَن ضَيْفِهِۦ فَطَمَسْنَآ أَعْيُنَهُمْ فَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
verses.translationText: And they had demanded from him his guests, but We obliterated their eyes, [saying], "Taste My punishment and warning."

verses.arabicText: وَلَقَدْ صَبَّحَهُم بُكْرَةً عَذَابٌۭ مُّسْتَقِرٌّۭ
verses.translationText: And there came upon them by morning an abiding punishment.

verses.arabicText: فَذُوقُوا۟ عَذَابِى وَنُذُرِ
verses.translationText: So taste My punishment and warning.

verses.arabicText: وَلَقَدْ يَسَّرْنَا ٱلْقُرْءَانَ لِلذِّكْرِ فَهَلْ مِن مُّدَّكِرٍۢ
verses.translationText: And We have certainly made the Qur'an easy for remembrance, so is there any who will remember?

verses.arabicText: وَلَقَدْ جَآءَ ءَالَ فِرْعَوْنَ ٱلنُّذُرُ
verses.translationText: And there certainly came to the people of Pharaoh warning.

verses.arabicText: كَذَّبُوا۟ بِـَٔايَٰتِنَا كُلِّهَا فَأَخَذْنَٰهُمْ أَخْذَ عَزِيزٍۢ مُّقْتَدِرٍ
verses.translationText: They denied Our signs, all of them, so We seized them with a seizure of one Exalted in Might and Perfect in Ability.

verses.arabicText: أَكُفَّارُكُمْ خَيْرٌۭ مِّنْ أُو۟لَٰٓئِكُمْ أَمْ لَكُم بَرَآءَةٌۭ فِى ٱلزُّبُرِ
verses.translationText: Are your disbelievers better than those [former ones], or have you immunity in the scripture?

verses.arabicText: أَمْ يَقُولُونَ نَحْنُ جَمِيعٌۭ مُّنتَصِرٌۭ
verses.translationText: Or do they say, "We are an assembly supporting [each other]"?

verses.arabicText: سَيُهْزَمُ ٱلْجَمْعُ وَيُوَلُّونَ ٱلدُّبُرَ
verses.translationText: [Their] assembly will be defeated, and they will turn their backs [in retreat].

verses.arabicText: بَلِ ٱلسَّاعَةُ مَوْعِدُهُمْ وَٱلسَّاعَةُ أَدْهَىٰ وَأَمَرُّ
verses.translationText: But the Hour is their appointment [for due punishment], and the Hour is more disastrous and more bitter.

verses.arabicText: إِنَّ ٱلْمُجْرِمِينَ فِى ضَلَٰلٍۢ وَسُعُرٍۢ
verses.translationText: Indeed, the criminals are in error and madness.

verses.arabicText: يَوْمَ يُسْحَبُونَ فِى ٱلنَّارِ عَلَىٰ وُجُوهِهِمْ ذُوقُوا۟ مَسَّ سَقَرَ
verses.translationText: The Day they are dragged into the Fire on their faces [it will be said], "Taste the touch of Saqar."

verses.arabicText: إِنَّا كُلَّ شَىْءٍ خَلَقْنَٰهُ بِقَدَرٍۢ
verses.translationText: Indeed, all things We created with predestination.
